title: Soothe and Shin Korma
description: A mild and creamy Indian-inspired dish featuring soothe and shin. Serve with basmati rice or naan bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced shin and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the ground gloopin and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped soothe and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in garam masala and salt to taste.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes.
Serve hot over basmati rice or with naan bread.
